name: Easy Pumpkin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the pumpkin, eggs, sugar, and cooking oil in a large bowl.
2. Add the flour, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, and nutmeg to the mixture. Stir until well combined.
3. Divide the batter evenly among three greased loaf pans.
4. Sprinkle sliced almonds on top of each pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a loaf comes out clean.
